form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Comes here off a 29-day let-up. At the latest run 4th of 11 at this track Ctry Mdn on March 8 over 1000m, 3.5 len behind Autumn King carrying 56kg at $13. The run before that sat on speed throughout when 2nd of 10 at Tamworth Ctry Mdn-Sw on March 2 over 1000m, 2.5 len behind Cosmolicious with 59kg at $3.20. Genuine gelding with strong each-way claims.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Returns from a 37-day let-up. Last start 2nd of 9 at Newcastle 3yo+ Mdn-Hcp on February 28 over 900m, slow going 1.2 len behind Precious Girl carrying 53kg at $4.80. The start before that sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 8 at Port Macquarie Mdn on January 6 over 1000m, 0.6 len behind Exceed Me with 55.5kg at $5. Huge chance from the inside draw back in a country maiden.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last preparation second last of 10 at Tamworth Mdn-Sw August 7 over 1000m, soft track; 7 len behind See You Then with 57kg at $61. First up last campaign fourth of 10 at Tamworth Mdn-Sw June 16 over 1000m, soft track; 2.5 len behind Rembroy carrying 57kg at $10. Might be better off following this outing.
